name: Ops Dash Connector
author: Legacy Sales Engineering
changelog: 1.6.2 — Self-healing: on activation (and once per version) the plugin deletes leftover broken copies from the malformed 1.5.x-1.6.0 packages — stray backslash-named files and duplicate opsdash-connector-* folders — and cleans dead active_plugins entries. Fixes destination-folder-already-exists collisions and duplicate plugin listings. 1.6.1 — packaging fix (forward-slash zip entries). 1.6.0 — self-updating. 1.5.0 — robots.txt, sitemap, heading fixes.
